hardware.notes: 24GB shared between macOS (~5GB), Docker (~2GB), and Ollama (~17GB). Tight but functional — fast SSD swap handles occasional memory pressure.

primary.role: Everything. Always loaded locally. Reasoning, coding, agentic tasks, tool calling, content writing.
primary.strengths: Best agentic model in 24GB class. Highest Intelligence Index. Best tool-calling and multi-step execution. Strong at frontend generation.

fallback_1.role: Primary fallback. Use when GLM struggles with a task, or for very hard problems.
fallback_1.strengths: Opus-tier coding. 80.2% SWE-Bench Verified. Excellent at complex architecture and multi-file projects.
fallback_1.risks: Rate limits unknown. Service could go down or be discontinued.

fallback_2.role: Backup fallback. Use when MiniMax is rate-limited or unavailable.
fallback_2.strengths: Same model family as primary, cloud-hosted. Good general reasoning.

last_resort.role: ONLY if all free options fail. Subject to £2/day hard cap.

sandbox_info.workspace_path: Use relative paths from workspace root: ./STATE.json, ./scripts/etc
sandbox_info.ollama_access: Only via gateway inference. Sandbox scripts CANNOT call Ollama directly.
sandbox_info.important: Test every capability before marking it as confirmed. Move items from expected_available to confirmed_working only after empirical verification.
